description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The property includes a driveway with a carport, a landscaped front yard with palm trees, and a backyard with a swimming pool and patio area. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, complemented by green lawns and paved walkways. The design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a minimalist aesthetic. Multiple outdoor seating and garden areas are integrated into the overall layout, enhancing the sense of space and relaxation.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, landscaped gardens, a carport, and a backyard pool, featuring clean lines and open spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, palm trees, and a landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, extensive window arrangements, and the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the backyard, pool, patio, and garden features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, green spaces, and the overall length of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
